title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 321.450 - Cases arising under this chapter to be advanced on docket — courts always open
text:
321.450.  Cases arising under this chapter to be advanced on docket — courts always open. — All cases in which there may arise a question of the validity of the organization of a district, or a question of the validity of any proceeding under the provisions of this chapter, shall be advanced on the docket as a matter of immediate public interest and concern, and heard at the earliest practicable moment.  The courts shall be open at all times for the purposes of this chapter.
(L. 1947 V. I p. 432 § 45, A.L. 1969 H.B. 322)
